parser_mapping.expected_output: Whether Anonymous users can join a meeting setting is enabled or disabled.
AllowEmailIntoChannel - True means Users can send emails to a channel email address AllowEmailIntoChannel - False means Users cannot send emails to a channel email address
Whether External Unmanaged user communication setting is enabled or disabled.
Third Party storge should be disabled

• AllowParticipantsToBypassLobby: Specifies whether participants can bypass the lobby when joining the meeting. The possible values are: o Always: Participants can always bypass the lobby. o Organizer: Only the organizer can bypass the lobby (default). o Never: No one can bypass the lobby.

• AllowMeetingChat: This setting controls whether chat is allowed during and after meetings. Possible values include: o Enabled: Participants are allowed to use chat during and after the meeting. o Disabled: Meeting chat is disabled. o In-meeting only: Chat is allowed only during the meeting but not after the meeting ends.
List of external users
• Get the value of Custom Apps Setting. The value in the example is False, so custom apps are unavailable in the organization's app
